channel.title: Posts on AI Engineering Journal: Joy, Thoughts and Practice
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on AI Engineering Journal: Joy, Thoughts and Practice

item.title: Anthropic RAG Architecture: Contextual Retrieval
item.description: How Anthropic architected their RAG system — Hybrid Retrieval + Contextual Retrieval + Reranking — by using an LLM at indexing time to give every chunk back the context it lost when it was split. My explanations and thoughts on such a canonical RAG architecture, and the valuable lessons for AI Engineering.

item.title: Agent Skills: My Explanation and Thoughts
item.description: Agent Skills package a task’s prompt, tools, and resources into a reusable folder the agent loads on demand. Here’s my way of understanding why they exist — by tracing how we’ve fed knowledge to LLMs — why they’re an important way to structure knowledge, and why automation may be the scalable path forward.

item.title: Anthropic Deep Research: Lessons from a Canonical Multi-Agent AI Application
item.description: Anthropic’s Deep Research is a pioneering AI application built on a multi-agent architecture. There are many valuable AI engineering lessons we can learn from their experience building such a system.

item.title: How Does an LLM Know Tool Use?
item.description: The power of AI Agents comes from an LLM’s seemingly magical ability to call Tools. Where does this magic come from? Here is a high-level overview to demystify it!

item.title: Recommender Systems with Generative Retrieval (TIGER): My Explanation and Thoughts
item.description: Understanding TIGER (Classic Paper on Generative Recommendation) — generating Semantic IDs with RQ-VAE and retrieving items by autoregressively decoding user sequence of Semantic IDs

item.title: Build Multi-Agent Deep Research with Claude Code
item.description: How I used Claude Code to build Multi-Agent Deep Research: following Anthropic’s Deep Research architecture

item.title: Build AI Web Search Demo V2 (Agentic Search) with Claude Code
item.description: How I used Claude Code to build AI Web Search V2: Agentic Loop, Tool Use, and Multiple LLM Calls

item.title: Build AI Web Search Demo with Claude Code
item.description: How I used Claude Code to build a minimal AI Web Search Demo: Design, Coding and Lessons
